signals.headline: SEC XRP Lawsuit Dismissal Confirmed as Key April Driver | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC XRP Lawsuit Dismissal Confirmed as Key April Driver | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's SEC lawsuit dismissal propelled XRP's April surge, alongside ETF inflows and institutional adoption, enabling outperformance vs. Bitcoin.[5]  
No newer confirmations today, but ETF data and macro relief (e.g., Strait of Hormuz tensions nearing Apr 22 ceasefire) amplify momentum.[4]

signals.headline: Ethereum and XRP Price Momentum Builds in April Bull Cycle | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum and XRP Price Momentum Builds in April Bull Cycle | YES | MED confidence**  
ETH closed up 6% for the week of Apr 17, testing $2,400 resistance with potential breakout to $2,800 if support holds; XRP also up 6%, reclaiming $1.4 as support eyeing $1.6-$2 rally.[1]  
April's historical bullishness highlights ETH Layer 2 growth and XRP post-regulatory strength, with on-chain accumulation.[2]
